heading: Voting assistance for blind, disabled or illiterate persons
label: 10508 Voting assistance for blind, disabled or illiterate persons
text: Any voter who requires assistance to vote by reason of blindness, disability, or inability to read or write may be given assistance by a person of the voter’s choice, other than the voter’s employer or agent of that employer or officer or agent of the voter’s union.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 1973aa–6 of Title 42
